brief_notes: Strong benchmarking paper with clear experimental design covering 13 pipelines across synthetic, mock, and real datasets. Well-structured tables comparing accuracy, runtime, and resource usage. Good discussion of accuracy-speed tradeoffs and practical recommendations. Weaknesses: claims 13 pipelines but only 8 are detailed, some tools from the list are missing from results tables, no confidence intervals or statistical tests on F1 differences, limited citation count (~12 refs), and strain-level resolution is acknowledged but not tested. The limitations section is honest and appropriate.
